headline: PNW Benefits From Expanding Customer Base, Strategic Investments
summary: Pinnacle West Capital gains from customer growth, data center demand and an $8B infrastructure push, but faces nuclear outage and commodity-price risks.

headline: Why Is Pinnacle West (PNW) Down 1% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Pinnacle West (PNW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
